name: ica-shopping
description: Search ICA products and manage your shopping cart via an LLM. Automates ICA's online grocery store using Playwright browser automation.

settings.name: ICA_STORE_ID
settings.description: Default ICA store ID (e.g. 1003577). Optional — you can also set it at runtime via the set_store tool.

settings.name: ICA_USERNAME
settings.description: Your ICA account username/email. Required for cart operations (add, edit, get).

settings.name: ICA_PASSWORD
settings.description: Your ICA account password. Required for cart operations.
